positive: A vibrant, stylized abstract celestial fox spirit (Kitsune) silhouetted against a deep indigo gradient sky. The fox should be depicted in a dynamic, ethereal pose, surrounded by glowing geometric particles and watercolor splatter effects. Focus on strong, clean lines and high contrast between the vibrant orange/gold fox and the cool blue/purple background. Central composition, suitable for a repeating pattern or single chest print. Vector art aesthetic combined with luminous gradient lighting, high detail, mystical, symmetrical balance, pop art influences, graphic novel style.
